svg.title: NexusAI system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Shows the three-layer architecture: React frontend, FastAPI backend with chatbot/RAG/agents, and storage layer with SQLite and Pinecone.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Home page work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Chat page stream responses?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG page work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Research page work?')
sendPrompt('What API endpoints does the backend have?')
sendPrompt('What does the Research Agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Critic Agent do?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent retry loop work?')
sendPrompt('What does Docker do for this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the global SQLite database work?')
